CustomField.description: Set to true by the CE Intake OmniScript when the project sector is Military and the project affects more than one DoD installation. Triggers additional extraordinary circumstances screening in NEPA_CE_Screener. Stage 16 finding: Military sector carries 1.65x federal friction multiplier driven by NHPA Section 106 multi-installation coordination — detectable at intake.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check when the project affects more than one DoD installation. Triggers NHPA Section 106 multi-installation coordination screening. Military projects with this flag carry a 1.65× federal review friction multiplier vs. California EIR baseline (Stage 16 analysis, RESEARCH_PAPER.md).
CustomField.label: EC: Multiple DoD Installations
